local_names.pa: ਮੁੱਖ ਮੰਤਰੀ ਅੰਮ੍ਰਿਤਮ / ਐੱਮਏ ਵਾਤਸਲਯ ਯੋਜਨਾ (ਗੁਜਰਾਤ)

income_thresholds.description: MA Yojana: Annual family income up to Rs 4 lakh (BPL + lower-middle income families with MA card). No premium required.
income_thresholds.source: Gujarat MA Yojana Guidelines / Gujarat Government GR

income_thresholds.description: MA Vatsalya seniors: Extended income limit of Rs 6 lakh per annum for senior citizens (60+ years)
income_thresholds.source: Gujarat MA Vatsalya Senior Extension Guidelines

exclusion_rules.description: Families with income above Rs 4 lakh excluded from MA Yojana (seniors up to Rs 6 lakh allowed)
Families with employer-provided health insurance above Rs 5 lakh are excluded
Gujarat government employees and pensioners covered under separate GCS/GMAS schemes
MA Yojana operates INDEPENDENTLY of PM-JAY; beneficiaries may hold both MA and Ayushman cards. No exclusion for PM-JAY holders.
Coverage limited to up to 5 family members under MA Yojana card

family_criteria.family_definition: Family of up to 5 members: head of family, spouse, and up to 3 dependents. Rs 300 travel allowance per hospital visit provided by the scheme.

covered_procedures: Cardiology (bypass surgery, angioplasty, valve replacement, pacemaker implant)
Orthopedic (knee replacement, hip replacement, spinal surgery)
Diagnostics and lab tests during hospitalization
Rs 300 travel allowance per hospital visit

required_documents.name: BPL Ration Card (Gujarat)
required_documents.notes: BPL or APL-1 ration card issued by Gujarat Civil Supplies; establishes income eligibility

required_documents.name: MA Card / MA Vatsalya Card
required_documents.notes: Issued after enrollment; Aadhaar-based verification is now the primary method

required_documents.name: Income Certificate
required_documents.notes: For applicants with income between Rs 4-6 lakh (senior citizen extension)

required_documents.name: Mobile Number
required_documents.notes: For OTP-based verification and scheme communication

enrollment_channels: MA Yojana empanelled hospital help desk
enrollment_steps: Step 1: Check eligibility at nearest e-Gram centre or call 1800-233-1022 with ration card and Aadhaar details
Step 2: Visit e-Gram centre or empanelled hospital MA desk with Aadhaar and BPL ration card
Step 3: Complete Aadhaar-based e-KYC (biometric or OTP verification)
Step 4: Operator verifies ration card and income eligibility against Gujarat Civil Supplies database
Step 5: Family members enrolled (up to 5) and MA card generated with Aadhaar linkage
Step 6: For treatment, visit empanelled hospital; pre-authorization raised and approved by MA Trust
Step 7: Cashless treatment at empanelled hospital; Rs 300 travel allowance per visit; no premium for BPL families
description_for_embedding: Mukhyamantri Amrutam (MA) / MA Vatsalya Yojana is Gujarat's state health insurance scheme providing Rs 5 lakh (Rs 500000) per family per year for secondary and tertiary hospitalization. It covers BPL and lower-middle income families with annual income up to Rs 4 lakh, with extended eligibility up to Rs 6 lakh for senior citizens (60+ years). The scheme is entirely state-funded with NO premium for BPL families and operates INDEPENDENTLY of PM-JAY. Over 2000 surgical and therapeutic procedures are covered at empanelled hospitals across Gujarat. Each visit includes Rs 300 travel allowance. Up to 5 family members covered per card. Enrollment via e-Gram centres and empanelled hospitals. Helpline: 1800-233-1022. Portal: ma.gujarat.gov.in.
